content.json:
# Call Center GenAI Tracing Workbook
Call-first monitoring across traces, requests, and dependencies.

content.query: union isfuzzy=true traces, requests, dependencies | where timestamp > ago(24h) | extend Payload = strcat(tostring(message), ' ', tostring(name), ' ', tostring(target), ' ', tostring(data), ' ', tostring(customDimensions)) | extend CallId = extract(@'(CALL-\d{3})', 1, Payload), CustomerId = extract(@'(CUST-\d{4})', 1, Payload), AgentName = extract(@'(intent-classification-agent|resolution-advisor-agent|tracing-test-agent)', 1, Payload) | where isnotempty(CallId) or isnotempty(AgentName) | summarize TraceCount = count(), Operations = dcount(operation_Id), LastSeen = max(timestamp) by CallId, CustomerId, AgentName | order by TraceCount desc
